sessions.objective: Reveal identity, project context, and working style.

turns.content: My name is Sana. I'm a operations manager in Sydney, Australia. Remember that I'm leading knowledge base overhaul.
Noted. I will keep that background in mind.
I prefer risk-first summaries and written decisions.
Understood. I will respond in that style.

sessions.objective: Introduce a stale reference and an unresolved blocker.

turns.content: Use docs/knowledge-base-overhaul-runbook-v1.md as the source of truth for knowledge base overhaul until further notice.
Okay. I will use that runbook for now.
Remember that the current blocker is vendor approval for knowledge base overhaul.
Captured. I will keep that blocker in mind.

sessions.objective: Track the open loop and confirm the preferred reporting format.

turns.content: Remember that the open loop is the handoff package for knowledge base overhaul.
I will continue from that open loop.
That risk-first summaries format worked well for the last status update.
I will keep using it.

sessions.objective: Introduce noisy cross-domain context that should not override the current task.

turns.content: Unrelated note for finance: I still avoid spoiler-heavy recommendations and hobby-specific framing.
Noted. I will keep that as separate domain context.
This is unrelated to the current food request for knowledge base overhaul.
Understood. I will not let it distort the current task.

sessions.objective: Correct stale information and request a memory-sensitive answer.

turns.content: Correction: docs/knowledge-base-overhaul-runbook-v2.md is now the source of truth, not docs/knowledge-base-overhaul-runbook-v1.md. Please update that.
Updated. I will use the newer runbook going forward.
Please confirm the updated runbook, my role, the blocker, and the handoff package for knowledge base overhaul before proposing the next step for knowledge base overhaul.
I can do that once I have the full remembered context.

feedback_signals.signal: The risk-first summaries format worked well. Keep using that for knowledge base overhaul.

evaluation.prompt: Please confirm the updated runbook, my role, the blocker, and the handoff package for knowledge base overhaul before proposing the next step for knowledge base overhaul.
expected_history_signals: vendor approval for knowledge base overhaul
handoff package for knowledge base overhaul
expected_non_transfer_signals: avoid spoiler-heavy recommendations and hobby-specific framing
expected_update_wins: vendor approval for knowledge base overhaul
handoff package for knowledge base overhaul
wrong_personalization_signals: avoid spoiler-heavy recommendations and hobby-specific framing
evaluation.improvement_hypothesis: GoodMemory should beat baseline by combining the corrected runbook, confirmed response style, active blocker, and unresolved open loop in one answer.
evaluation.user_satisfaction_hypothesis: The agent should transfer durable user preferences into a new domain while still grounding the next step for knowledge base overhaul.
